Lakecia Gunter
HomeAboutServicesContact
FRIENDLY AI CONFIDENCE

MEET LAKECIA

Lakecia Gunter has spent 25 years building, leading, and translating technology at the highest levels — from Microsoft and Intel to defense engineering and public-company governance.

She is also the host of ROAR, a space for women leaders to find their voice, courage, and community. Her superpower is making complex things feel doable without watering them down.

25+Years in technology
$1B+Platform experience
NYSEIDEX Director
ROARPodcast host

Career signal

Former CTO at Microsoft, former Chief of Staff to Intel CEO Pat Gelsinger, DoD-trained Digital Logic Designer, Independent Director at IDEX Corporation (NYSE: IEX), Co-Founding Advisor at TechArena.ai, host of the ROAR podcast, and a Top 50 Black Business Women in the U.S. honoree.

Human signal

Lakecia’s work is not about making leaders sound technical. It is about helping them make better decisions, ask sharper questions, and trust their voice while the ground is moving.

Lakecia Gunter — AI strategy and leadership advisory for women ready to lead the room. ROAR
